bias.description: generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches in-process rather than decoding the public TLC Parquet files
does not build CDF packages, receipts, manifests, contract verdicts, or checkpoint state
uses DuckDB deprecated C Arrow stream scan API to isolate scanner/materialization; not a production destination path
persists the current _cdf_row_key payload column so this isolates scanner shape from provenance-layout changes
sets threads=16 while keeping memory_limit=1GiB and max_temp_directory_size=1GiB to test host saturation under bounded memory

reference.name: duckdb_arrow_stream_scan_ingest_row_key_threads16
reference.semantic_work: materializes synthetic TLC-shaped Arrow batches into a persistent DuckDB table through DuckDB Arrow stream scan with _cdf_row_key, threads=16, and 1GiB DuckDB memory/temp limits
